mapper.select: /* 나의 TextToSQL 쿼리 목록 dataDashboard.selectDashboardSqlList */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.Q_CONTENT AS SQL_TITLE , A.TTSQ AS SQL_CONTENT , A.TTSQ_PARAM , A.AGENT_ID , B.AGENT_NM , A.REF_ID AS DATAMART_ID , C.DM_NM AS DATAMART_NM , DATE_FORMAT(A.CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS CREATED_AT , A.CHART_OPTION FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A LEFT JOIN TB_AGT B ON A.AGENT_ID = B.AGENT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DM C ON A.REF_ID = C.DATAMART_ID WHERE A.SVC_TY = 'S' AND A.TTSQ IS NOT NULL AND A.TTSQ != '' AND A.CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.CHART_OPTION IS NOT NULL AND A.CHART_OPTION != '' AND A.TTSQ_PARAM IS NOT NULL AND A.TTSQ_PARAM != '' ORDER BY A.CREATE_DT DESC LIMIT 200

/* SQL 실행 정보 조회 dataDashboard.selectSqlDatamartInfo */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.TTSQ AS SQL_CONTENT , A.REF_ID AS DATAMART_ID FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE A.LOG_ID = #{logId} AND A.SVC_TY = 'S' AND A.TTSQ IS NOT NULL AND A.CREATE_USER_ID = #{userId} LIMIT 1
/* 컬럼 코드 매핑 조회 dataDashboard.selectDashboardColCodeMap */ SELECT COL_ID , CODE_VAL , CODE_KOR_NM FROM TB_DM_COL_CODE WHERE DATAMART_ID = #{datamartId} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY COL_ID, SORT_ORD

/* 레이아웃 목록 dataDashboard.selectDashboardLayoutList */ SELECT LAYOUT_ID , WIDGET_ID , SORT_ORD , ROW_POS , COL_POS , COL_SPAN , ROW_SPAN , WIDTH_PX , HEIGHT_PX FROM TB_USER_DASHBOARD_LAYOUT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY SORT_ORD, LAYOUT_ID
